text:
MBSF ABCD V2, 
the DUAL_STUS_CD_XX value 10 identifies beneficiaries in Puerto Rico, Virgin Islands, and other 
territories with subsidized months; CMS includes these months in the count of dual months. There are 
different ways to classify dually eligible beneficiaries — in terms of whether he/she is enrolled in full 
or partial benefits. Additional information regarding various ways to identify dually enrolled 
populations, refer to the document CCW Technical Guidance: Options in Determining
